description_long: This is a stone sculpture depicting a seated, rotund figure with a joyful expression, commonly recognized as the Laughing Buddha or Budai. The figure is adorned with a beaded necklace and draped in loose robes, with one hand resting on its knee and the other holding a small object or sack. The sculpture sits on a rounded, slightly elevated base with visible weathering and patina, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The surface is textured, with visible folds in the robes and subtle details in the facial features and accessories. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, showing the draped robe and rounded form. The overall coloration is a weathered off-white or light gray, with some darker areas indicating dirt or moss.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a seated, joyful Laughing Buddha with beaded necklace and draped robes, sitting on a rounded base. The surface is textured and aged, with off-white and gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Laughing Buddha's face, beaded necklace, detailed robes, and both hands, with the left hand holding a small object.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded form, draped robe, and the profile of the face and hand resting on the knee.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe, rounded shoulders, and the simple, less detailed surface of the sculpture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the draped robe, and the rounded base, with the right hand visible on the knee.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
